description: Fix duplicate name check not working
goal: Fix IsNameUnique to correctly check for existing names
expected_behavior: IsNameUnique should return 1 if name is NOT in list, 0 if it IS in list
hints: Return values are swapped: found=not-unique=0, not-found=unique=1
Use Return 0 and Return 1 (NOT Quit 0 / Quit 1) - inside a For loop, Quit exits the loop not the method
Pattern: For i=1:1:existingNames.Count() { If (...=name) { Return 0 } }  Return 1
